meta.description: ACLS Rule Engine — Central Performance Database

deviations_attributed.recommendation: Begin chest compressions immediately — within 30s of arrest recognition.

deviations_attributed.deviation_message: First epinephrine delayed 250s in non-shockable rhythm — AHA 2025 recommends within 180s
deviations_attributed.guideline: AHA 2025 ACLS — Non-Shockable Rhythm Epi Timing
deviations_attributed.recommendation: For PEA/asystole: administer epinephrine 1mg IV/IO as soon as vascular access is established — target within 3 minutes of arrest.
Always obtain 12-lead ECG immediately after ROSC to screen for STEMI.

deviations_attributed.deviation_message: Temperature management not documented after ROSC
deviations_attributed.recommendation: Initiate targeted temperature management for all unresponsive post arrest patients. Target 32-37.5C.
Document airway opening technique used during resuscitation.
Document ventilation method used. Bag mask ventilation should begin immediately after airway opened.
Always document defibrillator attachment time for audit purposes.

deviations_attributed.deviation_message: Advanced airway not placed during resuscitation
deviations_attributed.recommendation: Consider advanced airway placement for prolonged resuscitation to enable continuous compressions.

deviations_attributed.deviation_message: IV or IO access not documented during resuscitation
deviations_attributed.recommendation: IV or IO access is required for drug administration. Document route used.

deviations_attributed.deviation_message: First epinephrine delayed 208s in non-shockable rhythm — AHA 2025 recommends within 180s
deviations_attributed.guideline: AHA 2025 ACLS — Non-Shockable Rhythm Epi Timing
deviations_attributed.recommendation: For PEA/asystole: administer epinephrine 1mg IV/IO as soon as vascular access is established — target within 3 minutes of arrest.
Always obtain 12-lead ECG immediately after ROSC to screen for STEMI.

deviations_attributed.deviation_message: Temperature management not documented after ROSC
deviations_attributed.recommendation: Initiate targeted temperature management for all unresponsive post arrest patients. Target 32-37.5C.
Document airway opening technique used during resuscitation.
Document ventilation method used. Bag mask ventilation should begin immediately after airway opened.
Always document defibrillator attachment time for audit purposes.

deviations_attributed.deviation_message: Advanced airway not placed during resuscitation
deviations_attributed.recommendation: Consider advanced airway placement for prolonged resuscitation to enable continuous compressions.

deviations_attributed.deviation_message: IV or IO access not documented during resuscitation
deviations_attributed.recommendation: IV or IO access is required for drug administration. Document route used.

strengths_attributed.description: Amiodarone given for refractory shockable rhythm

deviations.deviation_message: CPR delayed 38s after arrest recognition (limit 30s)
deviations.recommendation: Begin chest compressions immediately — within 30s of arrest recognition.

deviations.deviation_message: First epinephrine delayed 250s in non-shockable rhythm — AHA 2025 recommends within 180s
deviations.guideline: AHA 2025 ACLS — Non-Shockable Rhythm Epi Timing
deviations.recommendation: For PEA/asystole: administer epinephrine 1mg IV/IO as soon as vascular access is established — target within 3 minutes of arrest.

deviations.deviation_message: Rhythm check interval 140s exceeds 120s (+15s grace)
deviations.recommendation: Perform rhythm checks every 2 minutes as part of the CPR cycle.

deviations.deviation_message: Rhythm check interval 160s exceeds 120s (+15s grace)
deviations.recommendation: Perform rhythm checks every 2 minutes as part of the CPR cycle.

deviations.deviation_message: 12-lead ECG not documented after ROSC
deviations.recommendation: Always obtain 12-lead ECG immediately after ROSC to screen for STEMI.

deviations.deviation_message: Temperature management not documented after ROSC
deviations.recommendation: Initiate targeted temperature management for all unresponsive post arrest patients. Target 32-37.5C.

deviations.deviation_message: Basic airway management not documented
deviations.recommendation: Document airway opening technique used during resuscitation.

deviations.deviation_message: Bag mask ventilation not documented
deviations.recommendation: Document ventilation method used. Bag mask ventilation should begin immediately after airway opened.

deviations.deviation_message: Defibrillator attachment not documented
deviations.recommendation: Always document defibrillator attachment time for audit purposes.

deviations.deviation_message: Advanced airway not placed during resuscitation
deviations.recommendation: Consider advanced airway placement for prolonged resuscitation to enable continuous compressions.

deviations.deviation_message: IV or IO access not documented during resuscitation
deviations.recommendation: IV or IO access is required for drug administration. Document route used.

deviations.deviation_message: Inappropriate shock delivered during pea — non-shockable rhythm
deviations.guideline: AHA 2025 ACLS — Shock only for VF/pVT
deviations.recommendation: Defibrillation is ONLY indicated for VF and pulseless VT. Shocking PEA or asystole causes harm with no benefit.
